creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Sat, Jan 19, 2008 at 10:59:08AM +0000, Alex Keda wrote:
> >Synopsis:       cannot see large disk (more than 2T)

Have you tried gpt(8) instead of fdisk(8) / bsdlabel(8) ?

For what it is worth, I stopped making disks that large after I had
an fsck(8) not being able to do a full filesystem check due to
memory limitations...

Edwin
